title: Generation of Knockout Cell Lines Using CRISPR-Cas9 Technology
author: Shlaifer, IrIna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This protocol describes a CRISPR-Cas9 genome editing method to generate knockout (KO) cell lines. 

 Version 2.0 now available.
steps_raw:
This protocol describes a CRISPR-Cas9 genome editing method to generate knockout (KO) cell lines. 

 Version 2.0 now available.
